task_completion.description: Create the top-level 'Board of Directors' node
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a shape/box containing the exact text 'Board of Directors' positioned at the top of the diagram.

task_completion.description: Create the second-level nodes for President, Executive VP, and Secretary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three shapes/boxes containing the text 'President', 'Executive Vice President', and 'Secretary' positioned below the top level.

task_completion.description: Create the third-level nodes under President
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three shapes/boxes containing the text 'VP Infrastructure', 'VP Legal Affairs', and 'VP Marketing' positioned below the 'President' box.

task_completion.description: Connect all boxes with hierarchy lines
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visible connector lines linking 'Board of Directors' to the three second-level boxes, and lines linking 'President' to the three third-level boxes, representing reporting relationships.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the filename 'apache_org_chart.eddx' in the application's title bar, active tab, or a save dialog confirming the file is being saved to /home/ga/apache_org_chart.eddx.

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical diagramming tool
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent is interacting with a diagramming application (like EdrawMax) featuring a graphical canvas, shape libraries, and toolbars, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent used actual shapes and connectors
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the chart is built using actual graphical shape objects and connector lines provided by the software, not ASCII art or plain text spaced out on a page.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file using the application GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the file was saved using the application's graphical interface (e.g., File > Save As dialog) rather than terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an EdrawMax organizational chart (.eddx) from scratch. The expected output path is /home/ga/apache_org_chart.eddx. The specific required node labels are 'Board of Directors' (top), 'President', 'Executive Vice President', 'Secretary' (second level), and 'VP Infrastructure', 'VP Legal Affairs', 'VP Marketing' (under President).
